responseMessageContents.text:
The user is asking what they need to do to verify the app 100%. The blocker is that all runtime items require a physical Android device. I need to give them a clear, actionable checklist of what they need to do on their physical device.

Let me compile a concise but comprehensive device testing checklist that, when all items pass, would allow me to declare "IVX INSTAGRAM-STYLE MODULE DELIVERY VERIFIED 100%".

Here's exactly what I need from you to flip every item to **PASS — REAL DEVICE** and declare 100% verified.

---

## What you need

1. **An Android phone** (any version 8.0+)
2. **Download and install Build 34 APK:**
   ```
   https://github.com/ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest/releases/download/v1.4.3-build34/ivx-holdings-v1.4.3-build34.apk
   ```
   **Uninstall any previous IVX build first** — the signing certificate changed in Build 34, so Android will refuse the install otherwise.

3. **Your owner credentials:** `Iperez4242@gmail.com` + your password

---

## Device checklist — 15 steps

For each step, tell me **PASS** or **FAIL** (with what went wrong). That's all I need.

### Step 1 — Clean install & cold launch
- [ ] App installs without error
- [ ] Open app → Owner Login screen renders (not black screen, not infinite spinner)
- [ ] No diagnostic banner visible at top

### Step 2 — Owner login
- [ ] Enter `Iperez4242@gmail.com` + password → signs in successfully
- [ ] Lands on Home screen with live data (deal cards visible)
- [ ] No `no_supabase_session` error

### Step 3 — Members module (cached-first + skeleton)
- [ ] Navigate to Admin → Members
- [ ] On first open: skeleton placeholder cards appear briefly, then real member rows load
- [ ] Exactly 20 rows render on first page
- [ ] Scroll down → more rows load (pagination)
- [ ] Search for a name → results filter
- [ ] Close app, reopen Members → cached rows appear instantly (stale-while-revalidate)

### Step 4 — Reels module (autoplay + single player)
- [ ] Navigate to Reels tab
- [ ] First video autoplays automatically
- [ ] Scroll down → next video autoplays, previous pauses
- [ ] Only one video plays at a time (no overlapping audio)
- [ ] Tap to pause/resume works
- [ ] Like button → heart fills, no flicker on other videos
- [ ] Comment button → comment sheet opens
- [ ] Save button → bookmark fills

### Step 5 — Home cards
- [ ] Home shows deal cards with real data
- [ ] Tap a deal → navigates to deal detail
- [ ] No hardcoded/fake numbers
- [ ] One card failing doesn't crash the screen

### Step 6 — All 12 modules load
Visit each tab/screen and confirm it loads with real data:
- [ ] Home
- [ ] Market
- [ ] Invest
- [ ] Portfolio
- [ ] Reels
- [ ] CRM
- [ ] Admin → Members
- [ ] Admin → Investors
- [ ] Admin → Projects
- [ ] Admin → Deals
- [ ] Admin → Properties
- [ ] Admin → Transactions

### Step 7 — Pagination (pick any 3 modules)
- [ ] Scroll to bottom → more items load seamlessly
- [ ] No duplicate items
- [ ] No full-screen loading spinner during pagination

### Step 8 — Video upload (if you have a video ready)
- [ ] Open upload → select a video
- [ ] Progress bar shows upload percentage
- [ ] After upload → processing status appears
- [ ] After processing → video appears in Reels feed

### Step 9 — Image upload (if applicable)
- [ ] Any image picker (profile avatar, property photo, etc.) → gallery opens
- [ ] Select image → uploads and displays

### Step 10 — Performance & memory
- [ ] Scroll Reels for 30 seconds → no lag, no memory spike warning
- [ ] Switch between tabs rapidly → no crash, no freeze
- [ ] App stays responsive after 2 minutes of use

### Step 11 — Session & logout
- [ ] Close app (swipe away) → reopen → still logged in
- [ ] Logout → returns to Owner Login screen
- [ ] After logout → cannot access any protected screen

### Step 12 — Non-owner security (optional but ideal)
- [ ] If you have a non-owner test account: login → Owner AI and Admin screens should be blocked

### Step 13 — Failure recovery
- [ ] Turn on airplane mode → app shows network error, doesn't crash
- [ ] Turn off airplane mode → app recovers, data loads

### Step 14 — 10-launch test
- [ ] Force-stop and reopen the app 10 times → every launch reaches Home without black screen

### Step 15 — Build identity check
- [ ] In Owner Control → Diagnostics: verify SHA shows `5d7126d6` (first 7 chars), environment shows `production`, API shows `api.ivxholding.com`

---

## What to send back

For each step, just reply:
```
Step 1: PASS
Step 2: PASS
Step 3: PASS (20 rows, pagination works, cache works)
Step 4: FAIL — like button doesn't respond on second video
...
```

If anything fails, include:
- Which screen
- What happened (error message, blank screen, crash, etc.)
- Screenshot if possible

I'll fix any failure immediately and ship a new build. Once all 15 steps are PASS from your device, I declare **VERIFIED 100%**.
